---
title: "测试"
description: |
  <=test_place_holder=>
author:
  - name: "<=test_place_holder=>"
    url: "https://example.com/<=test_place_holder=>"
    affiliation: "<=test_place_holder=>"
    affiliation_url: "https://example.com/<=test_place_holder=>"
date: 2026-06-05
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{=html}
<style>
d-title h1::after,
.d-title h1::after {
  content: "";
  display: inline-block;
  height: 2.4em;
  width: 9em;
  background: url("title-badge.png") no-repeat center / contain;
  margin-left: 0.65rem;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
d-title h1,
.d-title h1 {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
</style>
```

<=test_place_holder=>
